summary: Comprehensive testing of Customer Portal feature and Membership Security fix. All backend tests passed (17/17). Frontend flows working correctly. Fixed missing Authorization header in MembershipsManager delete function.

bugs_fixed.root_cause: DELETE request only used credentials: 'include' but backend now requires authentication via Bearer token or cookie
bugs_fixed.fix: Added Authorization header with Bearer token from localStorage

critical_code_review_comments: Security fix verified: POST/PUT/DELETE on /api/memberships now require authentication (return 401 without auth)
Customer Portal uses JWT Bearer tokens stored in localStorage (separate from admin cookie-based auth)
Profile update correctly prevents modification of email and membership_tier fields
Navigation correctly shows 'Sign In' when logged out and 'My Account' when logged in
seed_data_creation: Test customers created during testing (playwright_test_*, nav_test_*, profile_test_*, login_test_*)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Customer Portal fully implemented and tested. Security fix for membership endpoints verified. Customer auth uses Bearer tokens in localStorage, admin auth uses httpOnly cookies. All 4 membership tiers (Free, Select, Prime, Premium) displaying correctly.

details: Returns JWT token and customer data
POST /api/customer/login with valid credentials returns token
GET /api/customer/profile returns customer data with membership info
Email and membership_tier cannot be changed via profile update
Registration form creates account and redirects to /portal
Logout clears session and redirects to homepage
Homepage shows 'Sign In' when not logged in
Homepage shows 'My Account' with user icon when logged in
Admin login works with correct credentials
Edit and Delete buttons visible on each card

frontend: Homepage Sign In link visibility - PASSED
Registration form fill and submit - PASSED
My Account link when logged in - PASSED
